title: ink flow
blurb: Ink advected through a curl-noise field, accumulated in a buffer that is never cleared. Mouse stirs.

title: coral bloom
blurb: Two chemicals feeding on each other grow luminous-membraned colonies that split, merge, and wander. Draw to seed; R wipes the dish.

title: cathedral
blurb: One distance equation, folded ten times, breathing. Nothing is modeled; the architecture rebuilds itself forever. Drag to orbit.

title: ember field
blurb: 1,048,576 particles combed into silk filaments by a drifting field. No geometry is ever uploaded. The mouse is a vortex.

title: nebula
blurb: The million particles learn depth: a volume of embers gathering onto the intersection curves of two invisible drifting surfaces. Drag to orbit.

title: hyphae
blurb: Two rival slime molds — a million agents — negotiate one glass ball. Each follows its own scent and flees the other's; the territories are their own doing. Drag to orbit.
